title: Cops and Robbers
writer: Piero Tellini, Vitaliano Brancati, Aldo Fabrizi
plot: Esposito is a thief who cons tourists in Rome. Officer Bottoni manages to catch him and starts persecuting him. When Esposito manages to flee, Bottoni's superiors inform him that he'll lose his job if he can't catch Esposito.
